zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri Aucher於大約1415年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親Henry Aucher26歲，母親Mary St Leger21歲。他於1448年之前與Isabel Alice Boleyn在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1494年在英國肯特奧特爾登享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri Aucher于大约1415年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Henry Aucher26岁，母亲Mary St Leger21岁。他于1448年之前与Isabel Alice Boleyn在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1494年在英国肯特奧特爾登享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特奧特爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: occupational name for someone who watched cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auch .
Scottish: topographic name from Gaelic uachdar ‘upland, summit’, or a habitational name from a place in Perthshire named with this word.

variants.name: Auch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Hermann, Otto.

South German (mainly Stuttgart): metonymic occupational name for someone who minded cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auchter .

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri Aucher was born about 1415, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Aucher, was 26 and his mother, Mary St Leger, was 21. He married Isabel Alice Boleyn before 1448, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1494, in Otterden, Kent, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri Aucher est né environ 1415, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Aucher, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary St Leger, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Alice Boleyn avant 1448, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1494, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri Aucher um 1415 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Aucher 26 und seine Mutter Mary St Leger 21. Er hat vor 1448 in England Isabel Alice Boleyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Otterden, Kent, England und wurde in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Aucher è nato il circa 1415 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Aucher, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mary St Leger, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Alice Boleyn prima del 1448, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1494, nel Otterden, Kent, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Otterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henri Aucherが約1415年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父Henry Aucherは26歳，母Mary St Legerは21歳であった。1448年以前にイギリスでIsabel Alice Boleynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1494年にイギリスケントオッテルデンで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントオッテルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri Aucher(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Aucher(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary St Leger(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1448년 이전 영국에서 Isabel Alice Boleyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 켄트 오터든에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오터든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Aucher nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Aucher, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary St Leger, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Alice Boleyn antes 1448, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1494, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri Aucher родился около 1415 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Aucher было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary St Leger, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Alice Boleyn перед 1448 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri Aucher nació aproximadamente 1415, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Aucher, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary St Leger, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Isabel Alice Boleyn antes de 1448, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1494, en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
